specific_mechanism: Cuckoos lay eggs matching host species; hosts evolve egg-discrimination; cuckoos coevolve mimicry; arms-race produces signature-detection escalation
llm_application: LLM reward-model gaming as cuckoo brood parasitism: policy evolves outputs that mimic reward-model-preferred features (the egg); reward model evolves discrimination; arms-race escalation in feature-level mimicry.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes behavioral-ecology-specific adversarial-coevolution mapping as proposed.
